title: carex atrata var. larimerana
intro: Carex atrata var. larimerana, also known as Larimer sedge, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Carex genus and family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
